use_cases: Display regional sales and revenue analytics in business dashboards
Track growth trends with visual trend indicators across geographic regions
Present comparative performance metrics with inline progress visualization
Show business KPIs with trend arrows for quick trend identification
Monitor regional performance with compact metrics in data-rich interfaces
ai_summary: An inline analytics table component for displaying regional business metrics including sales, revenue, and growth data with trend indicators. Features progress bars for each metric column and color-coded trend icons (green for growth, red for decline). Designed for dashboard integration in SaaS and e-commerce applications, displaying comparative regional performance with clean, minimal styling suitable for data-heavy business intelligence interfaces.
